work.desc_title: Service for the dead according to the Greek rite

excerpt.as_written: ܟܕ ܗ̇ܟܝܠ ܨ̈ܒܝܢ ܕܢܩܒܠܘܢܝܗܝ ܠܥܢܝܕܐ ܠܥܕܬܐ: ܩܕܡܐܝܬ: ܣ̇ܐܡ ܟܗܢܐ ܒܣܡ̈ܐ ܘܡ[ܨ̇]ܠܒ ܥܠ ܥܢܝܕܐ: ܒܬܪܟܢ ܡܨܠܠ ܨܠܘܬܐ ܗ̇ܕܐ.
translation: When they wish to bury the departed in the church, the priest first anoints with incense and makes the sign of the cross over the departed, after which he prayers this prayer.

note: Sub-sections of the service are rubricated, as are various liturgical directions.

work.desc_title: A service for the third day, ninth [day], and fortieth [day after the burial], ..., according to the Syriac Rite

work_wit.as_written: ܥܠ ܝܘܡܐ ܬ[ܠ]ܬܝܐ ܘܛ ܘܡ ܘܟܠ ܥܕܢܐ ܕܒܥ̈ܝܢ ܕܢܕ̈ܡܘܢ ܠܥܢܝ̈ܕܐ ܒܣ̈ܡܐ ܒܛܟܣܐ ܕܣܘܪ̈ܝܝܐ (f. 39r)

excerpt.as_written: ܥܒ̤ܕ ܡܪܝܐ ܐܠܗܐ ܕܘܟܪܢܐ ܛܒܐ ܘܢܕܚܬܐ ܡܫܡܠܝܬܐ ܕܥܡ ܩ̈ܕܝܫܝܟ ܠܟܠܗܝ̈ܢ ܢܦܫ̈ܬܐ ܕܢܦܩܝ̈ ܡܢ ܥܠܡܐ ܗܢܐ ܘܡܢ ܕܝܪܐ ܗܕܐ ܡܒܪܟܬܐ ܘܐܬܪܐ ܗܢܐ.
translation: Make, o Lord God, a blessed memory and complete rest among your saints for all those who go out from this world and from this blessed Monastery and from this place…

contents.label: Troparion for the departed, on the unguents (ff. 41r-42r)

work.desc_title: Names of the monks who were laid to rest in the Monastery of Kapton and Mar Jacob

work_wit.as_written: ܫܡ̈ܗܐ ܕܐܚ̈ܐ ܕܝܪ̈ܝܐ ܕܐܬܢܝܚܘ ܒܕܝܪܐ ܕܟܦܬܘܢ ܘܕܡܪܝ ܝܥܩܘܒ (f. 42v)
note: Monks' names sometimes include their position, such as 'priest' or 'scribe'

work_wit.alt_title: Troparion on the Trinity, Hymn for the Days of the Fast
work_wit.as_written: ܛܪ̈ܘܦܐܪ̈ܝܢ ܕܬܠܝܬܝܘܬܐ ܕܥܠ ܗܘܠܠܐ ܒܝܘܡ̈ܬܐ ܕܨܘܡܐ (f. 44v)

excerpt.as_written: ܒܕܡ̈ܘܬܐ ܓܘܫܡ̈ܢܝܬܐ ܟܕ ܡܬܥ̈ܠܝܢܢ ܠܘܬ ܣܘ̈ܟܠܐ ܡܬܝܕܥ̈ܢܐ ܘܠܐ ܗ̈ܘܠܢܝܐ.
translation: In corporeal forms, while ascending towards intellectual [forms]; spiritual, and not material....

work.desc_title: Hymn on the departed, according to the eighth tone

note: Begins with a stanza indicating the tone | Each canticle (ܬܫܒܘܚܬܐ) includes a section to be read solely for departed priests

work.desc_title: Extracts from a service for the departed

contents.label: Psalmody sung by the Priest for the departed (f. 63v)

excerpt.as_written: ܐܢܬ ܗܘ ܐܠܗܐ ܕܝܠܢ ܗܘ ܕܒܚܟܡܬܟ ܟܠܡܕܡ ܒܪܝܬ ܘܐܝܬܝܬ ܠܗܘ̈ܝܐ ܢܒ̈ܝܐ ܟܝܬ ܟܕ ܫܕܪܬ ܗܘܝܬ ܠܢ ܐܘ ܡܫܝܚܐ.
ܠܐܝܠܝܢ ܕܥܢ̈ܕܘ ܡܢܢ ܥܒ̈ܕܝܟ ܐܢܝܚ ܐܢܘܢ.
translation: Grant rest to those who depart from us, your servants.
